perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a Costco warehouse behind a shopping cart containing a massive grey plush cat with green eyes and pink ears. (2) One woman, wearing a zebra-print bucket hat, excitedly points at the cat and gestures its size. (3) The camera focuses on the plush cat's face and then the price tag nearby. (4) The woman in the hat opens a zipper hidden in the cat's tail/body and pulls out a white blanket with character illustrations. (5) They hold up a smaller version of the cat to show the difference in size and features.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals in Mandarin Chinese speak continuously with an excited and enthusiastic tone. (2) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop background music plays throughout the video. (3) Occasional digital sound effects (pings and sparkle sounds) emphasize on-screen text and price reveals. (4) Faint warehouse ambient noise is heard in the background under the music and speech.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the spoken dialogue regarding the cat's features and price. (3) Decorative Text: '比人還大 2499元!' (Bigger than a person, 2499 NTD) appears in bright colors. (4) Decorative Text: '80公分 超巨大' (80cm super giant) and '也太佛了吧' (Such a great deal) emphasize the value proposition.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Feature Showcase -> Hidden Feature Reveal -> Size Comparison -> Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, approximately 6 shoppers visible in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman in a black dress, another in a white tank top with a zebra-print bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco interior featuring high metal shelving stacked with bulk goods, price tags, and other shoppers.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a shopping recommendation aimed at Disney fans and Costco shoppers. It seeks to inform viewers about a new, high-value giant plush toy (Lucifer the cat) by demonstrating its size, hidden features (the blanket), and price compared to smaller versions, ultimately encouraging a purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses specifically on a product available at Costco, displaying the brand logo and price prominently while reviewing its features.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text overlays and high-energy Mandarin narration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The fast editing and constant use of emotional hooks make it highly suitable for short-form video platforms like TikTok or Reels.
